Warrant - Bench Warrant Return 021023 FTA MOTION TO REVOKE PROBATION FILING
CONFIDENTIAL APD Motion to Revoke Probation

roa.otherSubmitter: ROSE M. MILLER, CSR #5041, RPR, CRR, CRC, CRG

roa.docketEntryComment: /X PROVISIONAL MAYAN INTERPRETER KARENT NOVELO CHAN SWORN/X SAME SENTENCEON COUNT 1 AND 3/TWS/CH1:ISS:PROB 1Y:PJ 40D /CTS: 40/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CTORD: STAYED ALL FINES AND FEES/SUSFF/X:RESTITUTION RESERVED//WEAP/WS/IND/SA1:RANGEL LARA/SA2: CHEF SULLIVAN 622 GREEN ST,SF,CA/SAORD/SAORD2/SAORD3/X:STAY 150 YARDS AWAY FROM SUE HING BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION 125 WAVERLY PLACE,SF,CA/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/DEF: TO REPORT TO ADULTPROBATION DEPT, BY 06-01-22/CTORD: ANKLE MONITOR IS ORDERED REMOVED/CTORD: ACM IS TERMINATED/CCC: COUNTS 1 AND 3/VD: 06-03-22 DISPOSITION DATE IND23/

/CAL DISPOSITION/X PROVISIONAL MAYAN INTERPRETER KARENT NOVELO CHAN SWORN/AMEND: TO ADD COUNT THREE 236PC,MISDEMEANOR/X:PER STIPULATION AS TO  MENACE ONLY/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADVNL: 1 AND 3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL: BAIL MOTION; FW FROM D22/X: THE MAYAN INTERPRETER IS WAIVED BY DEFENDANT AND COUNSEL FOR TODAY,/X: DEFENDANT AGREES THAT HE IS WILLING TO USESPANISH INTERPRETER TODAY,/INTC/X: M SEELY, CERTIFIED/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THESHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND PLACED ON HOME DETENTION AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTHON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER ACOORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/CTORD: APPROVED HOME DETENTION ACTIVITIES INCLUDE WORK AND COUNSELING/RX/WEAP/SAORD/SA1: HELEN CHEN/SA2: 125 WAVERLY PLACE, SF, 94108 (DO NOT ENTER BUILDING)/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X: PTC HEARING DATE OF 05-17-22, D23 AND 05-27-22, D22 ARE CONFIRMED,/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT, DEFENSE BAIL MOTION/INTNC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,//NTW/LDTR: 07-15-22/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 26/TRANS 26:FORTHWITH FOR DEFENSEBAIL MOTION/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE IN S23/CONTD: TRIAL IN S22/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/X:COURT GRANTS THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 2, PC 5945(B)(2)(A), A MISDEMEANOR,/WIT SWORN:SFPD OFFICER VINCENT BUSALACCHI/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1 - PHOTO OF A WINDOW//EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 2 - PHOTO OF A PERSON/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 3 - PHOTO OF A BLOODYHAND/WIT SWORN:SFPD OFFICER MICHAEL PHENG/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 4 - PROP 115 QUESTIONARE FORM/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 5 - VIDEO FILE 041322032630/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 6- VIDEO FILE 041322032208/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 7 - VIDEO FILE 041322080853/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S ORAL MOTION TO REDUCE COUNT 1 TO A MISDEMEANOR PURSUANT TO PC 17(B) IS DENIED,/HTA1:1/X:THE MISDEMEANOR CHARGE AT COUNT 2 IS CERTIFIED,/BAIL:15,000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT IN DEPT 22 ON05-16-22/DOP/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE ARE ORDERED RETURNED TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/

/CAL: DEFENSE MOTION FOR BAIL REVIEW/X: SPANISH INTERPRETER, PATRICE BINAISA, SWORN,/INTC/MO DENIED/CTORD: WITHOUT PREJUDICE/X: THE 04-29-22 PRELIMINARY HEARING IS CONFIRMED,/X: A MAYAN LANGUAGE INTERPRETER ORDERED FOR 04-29-22,/LDPX: 05-02-22 (10), 06-17-22 (60)/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/X:TIME ESTIMATE ONE HOUR/NTW/LDPX:05-02-22/BAIL:15000/CONTD:BAIL REVIEW/DOP/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 20/TRANS 20:FORTHWITH FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DAWT/X: DA'S ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE IS GRANTED//CONT/DOP/
